title: Single-Talent Styling Journey
description: Follow one talent through multiple styling directions such as airport look, red carpet, comeback concept, streetwear, and beauty close-up without losing identity.

en.title: Single-Talent Styling Journey
en.description: Follow one talent through multiple styling directions such as airport look, red carpet, comeback concept, streetwear, and beauty close-up without losing identity.

zh-CN.title: 单人造型旅程组图
zh-CN.description: 同一个人连续切换机场私服、红毯、回归概念、街头、beauty close-up 等路线，做成明星式造型旅程海报组。
